---
title: "debug_vector.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\integration\debug_vector.py"
loc: 30
complexity: 4
logic_score: 3.40
style_score: 3.86
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 2.52
---

## Intent
The `debug_vector.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on debug. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via debug. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 3.4/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 4 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [os](file://os)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [src.core.engine.vector](file://src.core.engine.vector)
- [json](file://json)

### Exports
- `debug`
